summary: In pluripotent stem cells, *Nanog* is not repressed—it remains actively expressed alongside other core pluripotency factors such as Oct4 and Sox2 to sustain an undifferentiated state. This expression supports cellular self-renewal and prevents premature differentiation.

This expression supports cellular self-renewal and prevents premature differentiation.. Answer choice: A
